sessions.intent: Implement crypto module with pluggable provider architecture (Engine.Providers)

before.assumptions: Test stubs and plan already exist from test-designer. Identity module patterns are the reference for handler structure.
before.risk: Low — self-contained module with no dependencies on existing modules

sessions.plan: Implement ICryptoProvider interface, DefaultProvider (keccak256/sha256), HashedData type, hash handler, verify handler. Fill in test stubs. Skip bcrypt tests. Add Engine.Providers as generic pluggable implementation registry.

actions.context: Core crypto module: interface, default provider, types, hash and verify action handlers.
Engine.Providers — type-keyed ConcurrentDictionary<Type, object> for pluggable module implementations.
Replaced 15 stub tests with real implementations.

after.notes: Design evolved: Engine.Providers created as the proper generic solution for pluggable module implementations.

sessions.intent: Code analysis v1: OBP compliance and behavioral reasoning for crypto module
sessions.plan: 5-pass analysis of crypto module files + Engine.Providers.

after.notes: Ingi flagged critical miss: providers threw exceptions instead of returning Data.

sessions.intent: Code analysis v2: re-review after coder fixes

before.assumptions: Coder fixed all v1 findings + provider exception issue.

sessions.plan: Re-review changed files. Verify provider returns Data.

after.notes: Providers return Data, no exceptions in domain code.

sessions.plan: Run tests, coverage, deletion test, assertion quality.

after.notes: Test suite honest, critical paths covered.

sessions.intent: Tester v2-v4: fresh-eyes review, found null Hash bug, final PASS

actions.context: Found null Hash ArgumentNullException bug. Coder fixed. v4 PASS.

after.notes: All error paths covered after v3 fixes.

sessions.intent: Security audit of crypto module and Engine.Providers
sessions.plan: Blue/red team audit: timing attacks, provider substitution, key material.

sessions.intent: Cross-cutting integrity audit of crypto module, identity integration, and Engine.Providers

before.assumptions: Codeanalyzer v2 PASS, tester v4 PASS, security v1 PASS. All three reviewers approved. Looking for what they missed.
before.risk: Medium — Engine.Providers is new infrastructure affecting all future modules.

sessions.plan: 1. Read all prior bot reports. 2. Review code via full file reads. 3. Focus on cross-file contracts, architectural fit, review gaps. 4. Write auditor-report.json and verdict.

actions.context: Cross-cutting audit: cross-file contracts, architectural fit, review quality assessment. 1 minor, 2 nits. PASS.

after.notes: All prior reviewers did solid work. No cross-file contract gaps found. DefaultProvider per-call allocation is the only actionable finding.
